en: A: Is Kumu at home, please?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: Is Kumu at home, please?

ab: Uka hini heya, maanu gimun su ho?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?

ab: Tama rudan, yaku Samu, rwahi ku.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Samu, please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: Yaku tumun, meyah ku theyaq isu.
en: A: I’m tumun, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: Sndamac su. bsiyaq ta ini tqita di.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: Kiya na, lnglungun sumu bale, nahari prengo ta!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.

ab: Ah! Malu ba mahan ka ocya namu.
en: A:  Your tea is delicious.

ab: Ah! Malu ba mahan waso qhuni namu.

en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: Malu ma, so ba malu uqun qtaan ka hei qhuni nii.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.
B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: Mahada hnpure na bubu di, eyah nahari mekan.
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: Un, saye ku trima baga han.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: Kntengi mekan, uxe su seediq nganguc.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: Egu pnuqan mu da, mtengi ku bale.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.
B: Eat more, don’t be polite.
A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: Maha ku han, yahun su qmita bobo na di.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: Keeman da, maha ku sapa di.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: Un, eyah theyaq sapah mu niqan ali su.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
